summary: Iteration 32 - Fresh Meal Systems Module Complete. All 35 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Panel loads from sidebar, all 10 tabs render content and interactive features work (create run form, forecast generation, margin analysis, safety checks, packaging validation).

minor.issue: Uses query parameters instead of request body for packaging_type and cold_chain_zone - inconsistent with other POST endpoints

critical_code_review_comments: All 24+ backend endpoints implemented and working correctly
Auto-atomization creates 5 components (protein, veg, starch, sauce, garnish) for products
Cold chain validation correctly flags standard_box + chilled zone as invalid
Production runs calculate est_production_hours and est_labor_hours based on throughput reference
Assembly lanes auto-generate stations from KB assembly_zones and perform bottleneck analysis
Subscription stats correctly calculate churn_rate and meals_per_cycle
Forecast uses subscription data with growth_factor (1.05x) and skip_rate (12%)
Margin analysis includes unit_economics and volume_economics with channel-specific pricing
Safety checks return 5 validation items per check_type (pre_production, in_process, final, cold_chain)
Routes calculate total_distance_miles, est_time_hours, fuel_cost, cold_chain_cost
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_FMS_* prefixed products, production runs, assembly lanes, subscriptions, routes, safety records, and forecasts during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 32 verified the new Fresh Meal Systems module. Key features: 24+ backend endpoints at /api/fresh-meals/*, frontend panel with 10 tabs (Overview, Production Runs, Assembly Lines, Packaging Logic, Subscriptions, Distribution, Forecasting, Margin Optimizer, Safety Validation, Routing Planner). All CRUD operations work. Tab buttons use data-testid='fms-tab-{id}'. Tab content uses data-testid='{id}-tab'. Panel uses data-testid='fresh-meal-systems-panel'. KB loaded from /tmp/luccca_kb/luccca_fresh_meal_systems_master.json.

tabs_render.production: PASS - runs list, new run form
tabs_render.packaging: PASS - options, cold chain additives, validate
tabs_render.routing: PASS - routes list, new route form

mocked_apis.note: All Fresh Meal Systems endpoints are fully implemented with real MongoDB. POS/GL integrations (Toast, QuickBooks) are mocked elsewhere but not used by FMS.

production_runs_tab.create_form: Run name, product selection with quantities, lane assignment, priority
production_runs_tab.run_cards: Status badge, total kits, components, est time, labor hours, lane warnings

assembly_lines_tab.lane_cards: Name, type, stations, effective throughput, bottleneck
assembly_lines_tab.throughput_analysis: Hours needed, shifts needed, staff per shift, total labor hours, single shift feasibility

packaging_tab.validation: Shows valid/invalid status with issues and recommendations

subscriptions_tab.subscription_cards: Customer name, status, plan type, meals, delivery day, next delivery date, skip/cancel buttons

distribution_tab.channel_cards: Channel label, product count, active runs

safety_tab.recent_records: List with check type, status, date

routing_tab.create_form: Route name, channel, vehicle type, stops with address/distance/window
routing_tab.route_cards: Name, channel, stops, distance, est time, cost
